messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0043",
  "title": "投融资事件汇总",
  "page_index": 13,
  "page_range": "13"
}

Section text:
## 投融资事件汇总

只包含公开投融资事件

message.content: This section provides a compilation of investment and financing events, explicitly scoped to include only publicly disclosed transactions. It is designed to answer retrieval queries regarding: **Topics & Entities**: Which companies or projects received funding and which investors participated; **Dates & Metrics**: When funding events occurred and associated transaction details; **Evidence Types & Scope**: Confirms all documented events are based on public announcements, explicitly excluding private or confidential deals. The section serves as a structured reference for tracking market funding activity using publicly verifiable evidence.

What were the funding amounts/rounds? Does this section include private/confidential deals? (Answer: No, only public ones).

4.  **Draft the Summary (Mental Refinement - focusing on retrieval orientation):**
